_note: Mock learning path collection records. Items reference sample IDs from articles.sample.json, books.sample.json, and papers.sample.json.
_rules: Collections contain only approved content items.
Position field defines the reading order within the collection.
Collections are created by admins. Students cannot create collections in Phase 26e.
Collection status must be published before it is visible to students.

collections.title: Python for Data Science: Getting Started
collections.description: A curated path covering Python fundamentals, Pandas, and basic data analysis — designed for students with no prior Python experience.

items.note: Build a simple API once you know Python basics.

collections.title: SQL Mastery Path
collections.description: From basic SELECT statements to advanced window functions and query optimization. Suitable for analysts and engineers.

items.note: Window functions are essential for analytical SQL.

collections.title: AI and Machine Learning Foundations
collections.description: Covers neural networks, transformer models, and the mathematics behind modern machine learning systems.

items.note: The Attention paper is essential reading for anyone working with LLMs.
Survey to consolidate understanding of NLP approaches.

collections.title: Career and Resume Essentials
collections.description: A practical guide to writing a strong resume, preparing for interviews, and building a job search strategy.

items.note: Strong writing is essential for professional communication.
Strategic thinking applies directly to career planning.
